column1: # Generated from OptumGX FEM Plate Element Results
#   z_m: Depth below original seabed [m] (negative values)
#   k_py_S*_kN_per_m2: Lateral spring stiffness at scour S [kN/m^2]
#   k_tz_S*_kN_per_m2: Vertical friction spring stiffness at scour S [kN/m^2]
#   Spring stiffness k [kN/m] = k_py * dz * circumference_fraction
#   For full circumference: k = k_py * 0.5 * pi * D
